questionHtml: Estimate the distance the airboat travels to reach its maximum speed.
markschemeHtml:
recognition that area under the graph is distance covered ✓

«Distance =» 480 - 560 «m» ✓

 

Accept graphical evidence or calculation of correct geometric areas for MP1.

MP2 is numerical value within range.

meta.title: Estimate the distance the airboat travels to reach its maximum speed.
